info.title: u22a8.ai API · v1
info.summary: Versioned, resource-shaped REST API for scoring models.
info.description:
Versioned REST surface for u22a8.ai. Resource shape: `/v1/models/{handle}/...`. One error envelope, request id on every response, cursor-based pagination, OpenAPI 3.1.

## Authentication

Every endpoint requires a valid API key — `Authorization: Bearer <key>`. Issue keys in the platform console. A key authors only in namespaces it owns and reads its own namespaces plus the public ones (`u22a8` / `live` / `bench`). Within /v1, only `/v1/health` and the docs are open.

get.description: DB connectivity check — same probe as the top-level ``/health``.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source: curl https://u22a8.ai/v1/health

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import requests

requests.get("https://u22a8.ai/v1/health").json()  # {"status": "ok"}

get.description:
List models, ordered by handle. Returns a cursor-paginated page even when the result fits — clients should treat the shape as stable and opaque-cursor.

Without ``namespace``, the listing is scoped to the public ``u22a8`` namespace. Pass ``namespace=<name>`` to list elsewhere — it must be a namespace your key owns, or one of the public ones. Filter by ``state`` (``draft|busy|ready|failed|archived``) and ``kind`` (``scoring`` only at launch).

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models?limit=20" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests

r = requests.get(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"limit": 20},
)
for m in r.json()["items"]:
    print(m["handle"], m["traits"])

x-mint.content: Without a `namespace` query parameter the listing covers the public `u22a8` catalog. Pass `namespace=<name>` to list a namespace your key owns. Results are cursor-paginated: follow `next_cursor` until it is `null`.

post.description: Create a draft model. ``handle`` is required and must be in a namespace your key owns — there is no auto-minting. ``kind`` is reserved-now and only accepts ``scoring`` at launch.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://u22a8.ai/v1/models \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"handle": "acme.support-tone", "description": "Warmth and clarity of support replies"}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-mint.content: Creates a model in the `draft` state. The `handle` must be in a namespace your key owns. Next: add traits and samples, then train.

get.description: Returns the model's structured detail as JSON. Set `Accept: text/markdown` to fetch the **model card** instead — the same markdown the MCP server exposes as the model's resource. Reading a model is never gated by its additional terms; the card is how a caller reviews those terms.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/u22a8.commit-message \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests

r = requests.get(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/u22a8.commit-message",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
)
print(r.json()["traits"])

x-codeSamples.label: cURL (model card)
x-codeSamples.source:
curl https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/u22a8.commit-message \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Accept: text/markdown"

x-mint.content: Returns JSON by default. Set `Accept: text/markdown` to fetch the **model card** — a human-readable summary of the model, its traits, and any additional terms. It is the same markdown the MCP server serves as the model's resource.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X PATCH https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"description": "Tone and clarity of customer replies"}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests

r = requests.patch(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"description": "Tone and clarity of customer replies"},
)

x-mint.content: Patches model metadata; omitted fields are left unchanged. Lifecycle state is not patchable — use `POST …/train` to move a draft to `ready` and `DELETE` to archive.

delete.description: Archive a model: it moves to the ``archived`` state and stops serving on /v1. Samples and version history are retained. Idempotent — archiving an already-archived model returns 200. Permanent deletion is handled through account deletion, not this endpoint.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

get.description: Trait metadata with sample counts, descriptions, and polarity labels.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:

r = requests.get(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/u22a8.commit-message/traits",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
)
for t in r.json()["traits"]:
    print(t["key"], t["sample_count"])

post.description: Add or replace traits on a model, keyed by ``key`` (or derived from ``name`` when ``key`` is omitted). Scoring-kind only.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone/traits \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"traits": [{"name": "Warmth", "positive_label": "warm", "negative_label": "cold"}]}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests

r = requests.post(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone/traits",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"traits": [
        {"name": "Warmth", "positive_label": "warm", "negative_label": "cold"},
    ]},
)

x-mint.content: <Note>Draft-only — trait and sample edits apply only while the model is in the `draft` state. A trained (`ready`) model returns `409`; the samples and traits are frozen into its versions.</Note>

post.description: Derive intrinsic traits from the model's labelled samples and attach them. Draft-only. Returns 202 with a run id once enqueued; the model enters the ``busy`` state and returns to ``draft`` with the new traits visible on ``GET …/traits`` when discovery completes. A repeat of an in-flight or completed run with the same samples and effort returns 409 with the existing run id in ``X-Run-Id``.

409.description: Matching discovery already queued/running/completed.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone/traits/discover \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"effort": "medium"}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, time, requests

base = "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone"
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"}

requests.post(f"{base}/traits/discover", headers=headers,
              json={"effort": "medium"})
# Discovery runs asynchronously; poll the model until it leaves `busy`.
while requests.get(base, headers=headers).json()["state"] == "busy":
    time.sleep(5)

x-mint.content: Derives intrinsic traits from the model's samples and attaches them. Draft-only and asynchronous: it returns `202` with a run id, the model enters `busy`, and the new traits appear on `GET …/traits` once it returns to `draft`. Poll `GET …/models/{handle}` for the state — there is no run resource to fetch.

get.description: One trait's metadata. Includes its ``kind`` and, for discovered (intrinsic) traits, the discovery diagnostics — ``discrimination``, ``explained_variance``, and ``anchor_sample_ids``. ``key`` matches by trait key or name.

post.description: Append samples to a model. Each sample's ``trait`` field is resolved by key or name. Scoring-kind only.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone/samples \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"samples": [{"trait": "warmth", "text": "Happy to help — let us sort this out together.", "quality": 1.0}, {"trait": "warmth", "text": "Request denied. Refer to the policy.", "quality": 0.0}]}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests

r = requests.post(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone/samples",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"samples": [
        {"trait": "warmth", "text": "Happy to help \u2014 let us sort this out together.", "quality": 1.0},
        {"trait": "warmth", "text": "Request denied. Refer to the policy.", "quality": 0.0},
    ]},
)
print(r.json()["ids"])

x-mint.content:
Each sample labels one trait: `quality` `1.0` is the positive pole, `0.0` the negative. Up to 500 samples per request.

<Note>Draft-only — trait and sample edits apply only while the model is in the `draft` state. A trained (`ready`) model returns `409`; the samples and traits are frozen into its versions.</Note>

get.description: Cursor-paginated sample listing. ``trait`` filters by key or name.

x-mint.content: <Note>Draft-only — trait and sample edits apply only while the model is in the `draft` state. A trained (`ready`) model returns `409`; the samples and traits are frozen into its versions.</Note>

post.description: Train the model or re-tune it. From ``draft``, a first call runs a full training pass and moves the model to ``ready``. From ``ready``, set ``reoptimize_params=true`` to run a fresh parameter search; without it the call is a no-op, since routine retraining on new samples happens automatically. Returns 202 with a run id once enqueued; a matching in-flight run returns 409 with its id in ``X-Run-Id``.

409.description: Matching run already queued/running/completed.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone/train \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"effort": "medium"}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, time, requests

base = "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone"
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"}

requests.post(f"{base}/train", headers=headers, json={"effort": "medium"})
# Training runs asynchronously; poll until the model is ready.
while requests.get(base, headers=headers).json()["state"] == "busy":
    time.sleep(10)

x-mint.content: Asynchronous: a first train from `draft` returns `202` with a run id and moves the model through `busy` to `ready`. Poll `GET …/models/{handle}` for the state. From a `ready` model, pass `reoptimize_params: true` to force a fresh parameter search; otherwise routine retraining on new samples happens automatically.

post.description: Score content against the model's traits. URLs in `content` are auto-fetched and their extracted text is scored. Plain-text bodies (curl convenience: pipe a string or URL with no JSON wrapper) are accepted alongside JSON. Set `Accept: text/plain` for the bar-chart formatter.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

schema.description: Raw text or URL to score (curl convenience).

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/u22a8.commit-message/score \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: text/plain" \
  --data-binary 'Fix race condition in worker dispatch by draining the in-flight queue before shutdown'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests

r = requests.post(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/u22a8.commit-message/score",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"content": "Fix race condition in worker dispatch by draining the in-flight queue before shutdown"},
)
card = r.json()
print(card["composite"], card["scores"])

x-codeSamples.label: cURL (text view)
x-codeSamples.source:
curl https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/u22a8.commit-message/score \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Accept: text/plain" \
  -H "Content-Type: text/plain" \
  --data-binary 'Fix race condition in worker dispatch'

x-mint.content: Send `content` as JSON, or the raw text with `Content-Type: text/plain`. A URL in `content` is fetched and its extracted text is scored. Set `Accept: text/plain` for a bar-chart rendering instead of JSON. An optional `feedback` map captures labels as new samples for continuous learning. The full response shape is documented in [the score card](/concepts/score-card).

post.description: Score two texts (`a` is baseline, `b` is candidate) and return the per-trait delta plus the overall improvement. URLs in `a` and `b` are auto-fetched.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/u22a8.commit-message/compare \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"a": "fix bug", "b": "Fix race condition in worker dispatch by draining the in-flight queue before shutdown"}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-mint.content: Scores a baseline `a` against a candidate `b` and returns the per-trait delta plus the overall improvement (`b.composite − a.composite`). URLs in `a` and `b` are auto-fetched. Set `Accept: text/plain` for a side-by-side rendering.

post.summary: Fetch a URL and extract its text
post.description: Fetch a URL and return its extracted text — the same readable text the score endpoint scores when given a URL. Includes a content hash for deduplication.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://u22a8.ai/v1/extract \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"url": "https://example.com/article"}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests

r = requests.post(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/extract",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"url": "https://example.com/article"},
)
print(r.json()["content_sha256"])

x-mint.content: Returns the same readable text the score endpoint extracts from a URL, plus a content hash for deduplication. Useful to preview what will be scored.

get.description: List a model's versions, newest first. Each version is a snapshot of the trained parameters. The cursor is the lowest ``version_no`` from the previous page.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.source:

  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests

r = requests.get(
    "https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone/versions",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['U22A8_API_KEY']}"},
)
for v in r.json()["items"]:
    print(v["version_no"], v["tags"])

post.description: Pin ``{name}`` to the model's current active version. Re-using a tag moves the pointer. Tag names matching ``v\d+`` are rejected to keep the ``vN`` namespace unambiguous.

put.description: Activate a version — point the model at the resolved version so it serves scores. Use it to roll back or pin. Non-destructive: new samples keep accumulating and automatic retraining keeps minting new versions regardless of which one is active.

422.description: Request failed validation, or the handle is malformed.

503.description: An upstream dependency (database or model service) is unavailable.

403.description: The key lacks namespace ownership or the required scope.

413.description: Request body exceeds the size limit.

404.description: No such model, trait, sample, or version.

409.description: Lifecycle conflict — model busy, a draft-only mutation on a non-draft model, or an idempotent retry of an in-flight run.

400.description: Malformed request — a bad parameter, value, or empty body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X PUT https://u22a8.ai/v1/models/acme.support-tone/versions/active \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $U22A8_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"version": "v3"}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-mint.content: Points the model at the chosen version so it serves scores — use it to roll back or pin. Send **exactly one** of `version` (a `vN` number) or `tag`. Non-destructive: new samples keep accumulating and automatic retraining keeps minting versions regardless of which one is active.

traits.title: Traits
traits.description: Score only these traits. Omit to score all.

handle.title: Handle
handle.description: Namespaced handle, ``<namespace>.<name>`` (e.g. ``u22a8.foo``). Required — there is no auto-minting. The namespace must be one your key owns. Want a random handle? Generate the string yourself.

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: Model kind. Only ``scoring`` is accepted at launch — future kinds (classification/conformance/retrieval) land additively.

zero_data_retention.title: Zero Data Retention
zero_data_retention.description: Enable zero-data-retention. When True, samples are purged at every training completion, automatic retraining is disabled, and ``POST /score`` with a ``feedback`` block is rejected.

CreateModelRequest.title: CreateModelRequest
CreateModelRequest.description:
``POST /v1/models`` body. ``handle`` is required and must be in a
namespace the caller's key owns.

effort.title: Effort
effort.description: How much cost and time to spend on discovery: ``low|medium|high|xhigh|max``. Higher levels consider more candidate traits. Omit to use the default.

DiscoverRequest.title: DiscoverRequest
DiscoverRequest.description:
``POST /v1/models/{handle}/traits/discover`` body. Effort-only.

Draft-only. Pools the model's labelled samples, derives intrinsic trait
axes, and attaches them as ``intrinsic`` traits. Responds like train —
202 + run id on enqueue, 409 + ``X-Run-Id`` on a matching in-flight run.

url.title: Url
url.description: HTTP(S) URL to fetch and extract.

content_sha256.title: Content Sha256
content_sha256.description: Hex SHA-256 of the UTF-8 bytes of `content`. Stable for dedup.

fetched_at.title: Fetched At
fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp captured at fetch time.

state.title: State
state.description: Lifecycle state: ``draft``, ``busy``, ``ready``, ``failed``, or ``archived``. ``busy`` is the transient state while an asynchronous operation (training, discovery, retraining) runs — see ``last_operation`` for which one.

current_version_id.title: Current Version Id
current_version_id.description: Identifier of the version currently serving scores. Null before the first successful train; updates on every successful train or retrain.

version_no.title: Version No
version_no.description: Version number of the active snapshot — the integer behind ``vN``. Null before the first train.

version_tags.title: Version Tags
version_tags.description: User-named tags pointing at the active version.

zero_data_retention.title: Zero Data Retention
zero_data_retention.description: Whether zero-data-retention is enabled. When on, submitted content is not retained.

last_operation.title: Last Operation
last_operation.description: The most recent lifecycle operation: ``{kind, status, started_at, run_id?, progress?, error?}``. ``kind`` identifies what the model is doing while ``busy`` (e.g. ``train``, ``discover``, ``retrain``). Null on models that have never run an operation.

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor
next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when exhausted.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Page size used for this response.

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor
next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when exhausted.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Page size used for this response.

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor
next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when exhausted.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Page size used for this response.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Sample quality in [0, 1]. 1.0 = positive pole, 0.0 = negative pole.

version_id.title: Version Id
version_id.description: Active version that served this score, formatted as ``vN``. Null when the model has never been trained.

sample_ids.title: Sample Ids
sample_ids.description: Sample row ids minted from the ``feedback`` block, in the trait order supplied. Empty when no feedback was sent.

ScoreMetadata.title: ScoreMetadata
ScoreMetadata.description:
Audit and lifecycle metadata attached to a score response.

``version_id`` is the active snapshot the score served from, formatted
as ``"vN"`` to match the pinned-handle form (``handle@vN``); ``null``
before the first train. ``sample_ids`` is populated only when the
request included a ``feedback`` block — one id per trait whose feedback
was captured.

effort.title: Effort
effort.description: How much cost and time to spend tuning: ``low|medium|high|max``. Higher levels search more thoroughly. Ignored for automatic retraining.

reoptimize_params.title: Reoptimize Params
reoptimize_params.description: When True, force a fresh parameter search from a ``ready`` model. When False, a ``ready`` model is a no-op (automatic retraining handles incremental updates).

TrainRequest.title: TrainRequest
TrainRequest.description:
``POST /v1/models/{handle}/train`` body. All fields optional.

From ``draft``, starts a first training pass (the model moves to
``busy``, then ``ready``). From ``ready`` with
``reoptimize_params=True``, runs a fresh parameter search. From
``ready`` without it, a no-op — routine retraining on new samples runs
automatically.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Newly enqueued run id, or the matching existing run id on an idempotent hit. ``null`` when ``state == 'ready'`` and no re-optimization was requested (no run was queued).

state.title: State
state.description: Current model state after the call.

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: How the trait is defined: ``extrinsic`` (taught directly by labelled samples; its axis is re-derived on every train) or ``intrinsic`` (the axis itself is the trait, produced by discovery and held fixed across retrains).

discrimination.title: Discrimination
discrimination.description: Discriminator strength in [0, 1] for discovered traits (1.0 = perfect separation, 0.5 = chance). Null for authored.

explained_variance.title: Explained Variance
explained_variance.description: Fraction of variance the intrinsic axis explains. Null for extrinsic traits.

anchor_sample_ids.title: Anchor Sample Ids
anchor_sample_ids.description: Positive/negative exemplar sample ids anchoring an intrinsic axis (``{positive: [...], negative: [...]}``). Null for extrinsic.

key.title: Key
key.description: Stable identifier. Derived from ``name`` if omitted (snake_case, alphanumerics + underscore).

zero_data_retention.title: Zero Data Retention
zero_data_retention.description: Toggle zero-data-retention. Turning it on purges existing samples. Turning it off applies going forward only — earlier purges are not reversed.

version_retention_policy.title: Version Retention Policy
version_retention_policy.description: Auto-prune policy override. Keys: ``keep_unnamed`` (int, default 100), ``keep_first_of_month`` (bool, default True). Null clears the override and reverts to defaults.

UpdateModelRequest.title: UpdateModelRequest
UpdateModelRequest.description:
``PATCH /v1/models/{handle}`` body. Missing fields mean no change.

``state`` is intentionally **not** patchable: move a model with
``POST /train`` (``draft → ready``) or ``DELETE`` (archive), never a
``PATCH`` override. Unknown fields (including ``state``) are rejected so
the contract is explicit rather than a silent no-op.

VersionActivateRequest.title: VersionActivateRequest
VersionActivateRequest.description:
``PUT /v1/models/{handle}/versions/active`` body.

Exactly one of ``version`` / ``tag`` must be set. ``version`` is the
monotonic ``vN`` form; ``tag`` is a user-named pointer.

snapshot.title: Snapshot
snapshot.description: Self-contained trained-parameter snapshot. Large; omitted on scoring-scope reads.

VersionDetail.title: VersionDetail
VersionDetail.description: A version with its full snapshot payload (authoring scope).

content.description: Text or URL to score. URLs are auto-fetched.
content.title: Content

traits.description: Score only these traits. Omit to score all.
traits.title: Traits

feedback.description: Optional ``{trait_key_or_name: label_or_quality}`` map for continuous learning. When supplied, each entry is captured as a labelled sample alongside the score. Values may be a polarity label (``"positive"|"negative"|"good"|...``) or a float in ``[0, 1]``. Rejected with ``feature_unavailable`` on models with zero-data-retention enabled.
feedback.title: Feedback

code.description: Stable, snake_case error code. Grows additively; never renamed.
code.title: Code

request_id.description: Mirrors the ``X-Request-Id`` response header. Null if id assignment failed.
request_id.title: Request Id

details.description: Structured, code-specific context. Empty when there is nothing to add.
details.title: Details

ErrorEnvelope.description: Every non-2xx /v1 response carries this shape.
ErrorEnvelope.title: ErrorEnvelope

bearerAuth.description: API key issued in the platform console, sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

tags.name: Scoring
tags.description: Score and compare text against models.

tags.name: Extract
tags.description: Fetch and extract text from URLs.
